evals.prompt: I'm a freelancer making $150k/year. I'm currently a sole proprietor. Am I paying too much in tax?
evals.expected_output: Should identify the potential benefit of an S-Corp election (to save on self-employment tax). Should discuss common deductions for freelancers. Should emphasize that AI cannot file taxes and a CPA review is required. Should provide a Tax Strategy Report structure with an action plan.
assertions: Mentions self-employment tax savings via S-Corp election
Provides the mandatory CPA review disclaimer
Output follows Tax Strategy Report structure
Provides an actionable plan (e.g. tracking equipment purchases)
